title: mRNA Revolution Tracker Update — Apr 21, 2026
summary: AACR 2026 in San Diego delivered landmark mRNA oncology results this week. BNT122, the personalized mRNA pancreatic cancer vaccine from BioNTech/Genentech, showed ~50% of Phase 1 patients alive and cancer-free at 6 years — an extraordinary result for a disease with under 12% typical 5-year survival. Moderna's mRNA-4359 reported 83% overall response rate in first-line melanoma (Phase 1/2), while Abogen's novel mRNA-encoded T-cell engager ABO2203 achieved 100% complete response in the high-dose B-NHL cohort. The NCI announced a $200M cancer vaccine funding commitment at AACR, partially reversing 2025 pipeline cuts. Two new map points added (MSK, Genentech). KPIs updated to reflect V940 5-year survival data (49% death rate reduction). Ugur Sahin's role updated to reflect planned BioNTech departure.

title: mRNA Revolution Tracker Update — Mon Apr 20, 2026
summary: Dr. NCI Announces $200M Cancer Vaccine Funding at AACR as mRNA Pipeline Shows Resilience.

title: mRNA Revolution Tracker Update — Sat Apr 18, 2026
summary: At the ESCMID Global Congress in Munich (April 17–21, 2026), Moderna presented two late-breaking data sets relevant to mRNA vaccine revaccination in older adults.

title: mRNA Revolution Tracker Update — Fri Apr 17, 2026
summary: Moderna mRNA-4359 Shows 83% Response Rate in First-Line Melanoma at AACR 2026. Everest Medicines presented first-in-human Phase 1 data for EVM16, their proprietary personalized mRNA neoantigen cancer vaccine, at AACR 2026 in San Diego. ABO2203: mRNA-Encoded T-Cell Engager Achieves 100% Complete Response in High-Dose B-NHL Cohort.

title: mRNA Revolution Tracker Update — Thu Apr 16, 2026
summary: Storm Therapeutics Raises $56M Series C for mRNA Methylation Cancer Therapy.

title: mRNA Revolution Tracker: Comprehensive Historical Backfill
summary: Comprehensive seed backfill for the mRNA Revolution tracker covering the full platform timeline from the December 2020 COVID vaccine authorizations through 2026. Key milestones documented: FDA/EMA/WHO COVID mRNA vaccine approvals (2020–2022), bivalent booster authorizations, KEYNOTE-942 Phase 2 melanoma data (44% recurrence reduction), FDA Breakthrough Therapy Designation for mRNA-4157/V940, first non-COVID mRNA vaccine approvals (mResvia RSV, 2023), Nobel Prize to Karikó and Weissman, Japan's first saRNA approval (ARCT-154/Kostaive), Phase 3 cancer vaccine program launch, mRNA flu vaccine Phase 3, and advancing HIV/malaria/rare disease programs. Data populated across 6 sections: 8 KPIs, 30 timeline events (5 eras), 20 global map points, 15 contested claims, 12 key actors, and 8 economic indicators.
